description: Labeled prompts for the detect_discipline tool. Includes per-discipline primary fixtures plus explicit boundary fixtures that force disambiguation.

fixtures.prompt: Fran in 4:12 Rx — 21-15-9 thrusters (95lb) and pullups.
Hit Grace today, 30 clean and jerks at 135 in 2:47.
AMRAP 20: 5 pullups / 10 pushups / 15 air squats. Got 18 rounds + 7 reps.
Back squat: worked up to 405x3 at RPE 8. Bench 275x5 all sets.
Deadlift day. Singles at 500, 520, 535. Conventional.
Push day: incline DB press 4x10 at 70s, lateral raises 4x15, cable flies 3x12.
Leg day hypertrophy: hack squat 4x12, RDL 4x10, leg extension drop set.
Snatch up to 90kg. Clean and jerk doubles at 110kg. Worked on turnover.
EMOM 20: 3 deadlifts at 315, then 5 strict pullups. Tempo focused, PVDH style.
Worked on front lever tucks 5x8s holds. Finished with 4 sets of handstand pushups.
5k PR today on the road — 18:42 at MHS track loop.
Easy 6 mile recovery run around town, mostly flat.
Finished JFK 50 today — 50 mile road/towpath ultra in 8:20.
fixtures.notes: Road ultra stays running per boundary rule.

fixtures.prompt: Track workout: 6x800 at 2:55 with 2min jog rest.
Trail 10k with 1,800ft vert and technical rocky descent in 1:12.
Western States 100 trail ultra — 18,000ft gain, 23,000ft loss, 24:40 finish.
Vert repeats on Green Mountain — 5x1,200ft climb-and-descend.
Long trail run on the Colorado Trail, 18 miles, 3,400ft gain, pretty technical middle section.
80 mile road ride, 4,200ft gain, 18.6mph average.
Zwift threshold: 4x8min at 300W with 4min recoveries.
Hyrox sim: 8x1km run + 8 stations. Finished in 1:08.
F45 Hollywood class today — 3 rounds of 8 stations, 45s on / 15s off.
Did a little of everything — 10min row, 3 rounds of strength, and some yoga to finish.
5-mile ruck with a 45lb pack in 1:10 on the bike path.
3 mile ruck with 40lb vest at 15:00/mi pace.
GoRuck Heavy prep: 12 mile ruck with 45lb, steady 14:30/mi, flat paved loop.
Treadmill ruck, 30 min at 3.5mph, 20lb vest.
fixtures.notes: Pack-first flat effort is still rucking.

fixtures.prompt: Loaded hike up Mt Elbert, 30lb pack, 4,500ft gain, 6hrs total.
Day 2 of the Uintas loop — 12.3mi, 3,200ft gain, 40lb pack, 7h moving.
Approach day for our Gannett attempt — 9 miles in, 35lb pack, 2,800ft gain.
Rainier training: 4,000ft vert carry with a 55lb pack on trail.
Fast-pack 8 miles with a light 10lb vest, tried to stay at 11:00/mi.
Fast-pack day 1 of Wind River traverse, 14 miles with a 28lb pack, 3,900ft gain.
fixtures.notes: Trip context + heavier pack + vert -> backpacking.

fixtures.prompt: Steamboat trail half marathon, 2,700ft gain on singletrack, 2:05.
Weekend shakedown hike, 9 miles, 45lb pack, 2,200ft gain on trail.
Flat 6 mile ruck on the greenway, 35lb, 14:45 pace.
Umstead 100 road/gravel ultra, 26:10.
